arts.ttl: Brighton and Fulham pair being lined up by Ajax transfer planners
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion’s Joel Veltman is on Ajax’s list of options for this month, alongside Fulham’s Kenny Tete. That’s according to De Telegraaf, who report the pair are on the list at the Dutch club as they consider replacements for Devyne Rensch. The newspaper state that Ajax are preparing for Rensch’s departure this month. The post Brighton and Fulham pair being lined up by Ajax transfer planners appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Brighton have ‘no problems shelling out’ €10m for January signing – Player likely moving to England
arts.sum: Last month, we covered claims from Italy which stated Brighton & Hove Albion have made contact to sign Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode. On January 7th, Firenze Viola suggested the Seagulls’ good ties with the Serie A side can help them sign the right-back in the winter market. arts.ttl: Brighton ‘express interest’ in signing Chelsea centre-back
arts.sum: Brighton have expressed an interest in signing Tosin Adarabioyo from Chelsea this month. The Seagulls are seeking a replacement for Igor, who has been ruled out for the remainder of the campaign after undergoing hamstring surgery.
